<!--
Thanks for contributing! Please keep pull requests focused on one logical
change. See CONTRIBUTING.md for setup and the checks CI expects.
-->

## What does this change?

<!-- A short description of the change and why it's needed. -->

## Related issue

<!-- e.g. Closes #123 -->

## Checklist

- [ ] One logical change, focused and reviewable
- [ ] Added or updated tests that fail without this change
- [ ] Ran the relevant checks locally (see CONTRIBUTING.md):
  - [ ] `cargo test --workspace` / `cargo clippy` / `cargo fmt --check` (Rust)
  - [ ] `npm run test` / `npm run check` (frontend)
  - [ ] `uv run pytest` (training)
- [ ] No telemetry, analytics, or remote image processing added
- [ ] Docs updated if behavior changed
